block_02: Thank you for opening an account with IQ Option Europe Ltd.
block_04: If you have not verified your account just yet, you might want to push the button below and go through the verification process. Please note that you will need Proof of Identity and Proof of Residence to do so.
block_05: Please note you may be required to provide additional information and/or documentation. In accordance with regulatory legislation, we are required to fulfil basic requirements pertaining to the prevention of money laundering and terrorist financing.
block_06: Verification will also make your account more secure and help you protect the invested funds.
block_09: Please be informed that you have been categorised as a retail client in accordance with MiFID II requirements.
block_10: For additional information about IQ Option’s client categorization, the applicable level of protection and how to request for a change in categorization, please follow the link below. We will review your application accordingly upon submission.
block_12: Thank you for choosing IQ Option as your trusted broker!
